name: slide-1-title
text: From Python Prototype to Browser-Based BlinkGuard
textPreview: From Python Prototype to Browser-Based BlinkGuard

name: bullet-text-86-200
text: Deploy the eye-state detection pipeline as a real-time web application.
textPreview: Deploy the eye-state detection pipeline as a real-time web application.

name: bullet-text-86-236
text: Run all inference directly in the user's browser.
textPreview: Run all inference directly in the user's browser.

name: bullet-text-86-272
text: Track blink behavior and drowsiness using webcam input.
textPreview: Track blink behavior and drowsiness using webcam input.

name: bullet-text-86-308
text: Provide alerts when users forget to blink during long focus sessions.
textPreview: Provide alerts when users forget to blink during long focus sessions.

name: bullet-text-86-344
text: Keep the system privacy-friendly by avoiding server-side video processing.
textPreview: Keep the system privacy-friendly by avoiding server-side video processing.

text: This deployment stage turns the research pipeline into a usable client-side product called BlinkGuard.

name: slide-2-title
text: Why Run Everything in the Browser?
textPreview: Why Run Everything in the Browser?

name: bullet-text-86-200
text: The final TimeSeries EAR model is a lightweight Linear SVM.
textPreview: The final TimeSeries EAR model is a lightweight Linear SVM.

name: bullet-text-86-236
text: Inference is fast enough to run directly on laptops and phones.
textPreview: Inference is fast enough to run directly on laptops and phones.

name: bullet-text-86-272
text: No backend server is required for camera processing or model inference.
textPreview: No backend server is required for camera processing or model inference.

name: bullet-text-86-308
text: Webcam frames stay on the user's device.
textPreview: Webcam frames stay on the user's device.

name: bullet-text-86-344
text: The app can be hosted as a static website with very low deployment cost.
textPreview: The app can be hosted as a static website with very low deployment cost.

name: text-426
text: Client-side deployment gives us low latency, better privacy, and almost zero server cost.
textPreview: Client-side deployment gives us low latency, better privacy, and almost zero server cost.

text: This model was selected because it achieved strong benchmark performance while remaining small and easy to port to JavaScript.

name: bullet-text-86-200
text: 7 normalized EAR values from a sliding window
textPreview: 7 normalized EAR values from a sliding window

name: text-498
text: The JavaScript feature extraction must match the Python training pipeline exactly.
textPreview: The JavaScript feature extraction must match the Python training pipeline exactly.

name: bullet-text-86-200
text: Load the trained model with joblib.
textPreview: Load the trained model with joblib.

name: bullet-text-86-308
text: No machine learning library is required in the browser.
textPreview: No machine learning library is required in the browser.

name: bullet-text-86-414
text: index.html: UI layout, camera view, dashboard, controls

name: text-604
text: The entire app can be deployed as static files.
textPreview: The entire app can be deployed as static files.

text: This architecture mirrors the Python realtime pipeline, but it runs fully in the browser.

text: Slide 9: Eye Tracking with MediaPipe JS

name: bullet-text-86-272
text: Extracts facial landmarks directly from the webcam stream.
textPreview: Extracts facial landmarks directly from the webcam stream.

name: bullet-text-86-308
text: No video frame is uploaded to a server.
textPreview: No video frame is uploaded to a server.

name: bullet-text-86-344
text: MediaPipe assets are loaded from CDN for MVP simplicity.
textPreview: MediaPipe assets are loaded from CDN for MVP simplicity.

name: text-426
text: MediaPipe WASM/model files can be self-hosted later to reduce CDN dependency.
textPreview: MediaPipe WASM/model files can be self-hosted later to reduce CDN dependency.

title: Slide 10: EAR Calculation in the Browser

text: Slide 10: EAR Calculation in the Browser
textPreview: Slide 10: EAR Calculation in the Browser

name: slide-10-title
text: Eye Aspect Ratio on Web Landmarks
textPreview: Eye Aspect Ratio on Web Landmarks

name: text-612
text: Using the smaller EAR improves sensitivity when one eye is partially occluded or estimated incorrectly.
textPreview: Using the smaller EAR improves sensitivity when one eye is partially occluded or estimated incorrectly.

name: bullet-text-86-200
text: The app collects the first 15 EAR samples.
textPreview: The app collects the first 15 EAR samples.

name: bullet-text-86-468
text: During runtime, the baseline is updated with expanding max.
textPreview: During runtime, the baseline is updated with expanding max.

name: text-656
text: Dynamic calibration adapts the system to different users and eye shapes.
textPreview: Dynamic calibration adapts the system to different users and eye shapes.

title: Slide 12: Sampling Rate and Sliding Window

name: slide-12-section
text: Slide 12: Sampling Rate and Sliding Window
textPreview: Slide 12: Sampling Rate and Sliding Window

name: bullet-text-86-200
text: The model was trained on EAR sequences sampled around 15 FPS.
textPreview: The model was trained on EAR sequences sampled around 15 FPS.

name: bullet-text-86-236
text: The browser does not run inference on every animation frame.
textPreview: The browser does not run inference on every animation frame.

name: bullet-text-86-504
text: Inference only starts after the 7-frame window is full.
textPreview: Inference only starts after the 7-frame window is full.

text: This keeps the web runtime consistent with the training pipeline.

name: bullet-text-86-200
text: If all normalized EAR values in the window are high, the eye is considered open.
textPreview: If all normalized EAR values in the window are high, the eye is considered open.

name: bullet-text-86-388
text: SVM inference only runs when the window looks suspicious.
textPreview: SVM inference only runs when the window looks suspicious.

name: text-578
text: The hybrid filter reduces CPU usage while preserving real-time responsiveness.
textPreview: The hybrid filter reduces CPU usage while preserving real-time responsiveness.

name: bullet-text-86-200
text: Start, stop, and reset camera session
textPreview: Start, stop, and reset camera session

text: The web app evolved from a drowsiness demo into a lightweight eye-health assistant.

name: bullet-text-86-200
text: The app stores timestamps for detected blink events.
textPreview: The app stores timestamps for detected blink events.

name: bullet-text-86-236
text: Blink rate is calculated from the last 60 seconds.
textPreview: Blink rate is calculated from the last 60 seconds.

name: text-542
text: Warn users when they focus too long and blink less than expected.
textPreview: Warn users when they focus too long and blink less than expected.

name: slide-16-title
text: Alerting Users Who Forget to Blink
textPreview: Alerting Users Who Forget to Blink

name: bullet-text-86-200
text: The app tracks time since the last detected blink.
textPreview: The app tracks time since the last detected blink.

name: bullet-text-86-352
text: If the user does not blink for over 15 seconds:
textPreview: If the user does not blink for over 15 seconds:

name: text-506
text: This feature targets users who stare at the screen during long focus sessions.
textPreview: This feature targets users who stare at the screen during long focus sessions.

name: bullet-text-86-200
text: The SVM predicts class 2 for sleep / long closure.
textPreview: The SVM predicts class 2 for sleep / long closure.

name: bullet-text-86-388
text: If enough recent predictions are class 2, the app triggers a drowsiness warning.
textPreview: If enough recent predictions are class 2, the app triggers a drowsiness warning.

name: bullet-text-86-424
text: Drowsy events are counted in the dashboard.
textPreview: Drowsy events are counted in the dashboard.

text: This prevents short blinks from being treated as sleep.

name: bullet-text-86-236
text: User enables alerts with Enable Notifications.
textPreview: User enables alerts with Enable Notifications.

name: text-568
text: “You have not blinked for X seconds. Blink a few times and look away from the screen.”
textPreview: “You have not blinked for X seconds. Blink a few times and look away from the screen.”

name: bullet-text-86-424
text: HTTPS is required for webcam and notification APIs outside localhost.
textPreview: HTTPS is required for webcam and notification APIs outside localhost.

name: text-506
text: BlinkGuard can be deployed as a free or low-cost static web app.
textPreview: BlinkGuard can be deployed as a free or low-cost static web app.

name: bullet-text-86-200
text: Python SVM model was converted to pure JavaScript.
textPreview: Python SVM model was converted to pure JavaScript.

name: bullet-text-86-236
text: MediaPipe JS handles real-time face and eye tracking.
textPreview: MediaPipe JS handles real-time face and eye tracking.

name: bullet-text-86-272
text: EAR-based TimeSeries logic runs fully in the browser.
textPreview: EAR-based TimeSeries logic runs fully in the browser.

name: bullet-text-86-308
text: BlinkGuard monitors blinking behavior and drowsiness.
textPreview: BlinkGuard monitors blinking behavior and drowsiness.

name: bullet-text-86-344
text: System notifications extend alerts beyond the web UI.
textPreview: System notifications extend alerts beyond the web UI.

name: bullet-text-86-380
text: The app is ready for static hosting on Cloudflare Pages.
textPreview: The app is ready for static hosting on Cloudflare Pages.

name: text-462
text: BlinkGuard demonstrates how a lightweight ML model can become a privacy-friendly, real-time web application without server-side inference.
textPreview: BlinkGuard demonstrates how a lightweight ML model can become a privacy-friendly, real-time web application without server-side inference.
